acknowledgments.summary: Internally discovered and reported by Giuseppe Cocomazzi of Fortinet Product Security team.

document.title: Buffer overflow in TFTP client library of CLI

cwe.name: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')

notes.text: Buffer overflow in FortiOS TFTP client library
notes.title: Summary

remediations.details:
FortiOS 7.0: Upgrade to 7.0.3 or above
FortiOS 6.4: Upgrade to 6.4.8 or above
FortiOS 6.2: Upgrade to 6.2.10 or above
FortiOS 6.0: Upgrade to 6.0.14 or above
FortiOS 5.6: Migrate to a fixed release
FortiOS 5.4: Migrate to a fixed release
FortiOS 5.2: Migrate to a fixed release
FortiOS 5.0: Migrate to a fixed release
